steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize a difference between Harriet Delaney and Nora Whitcomb. The notes give us their service dates: Harriet served 1832–1862 (19th century) and Nora served 1904–1920 (20th century). A correct answer must name both keepers and contrast them.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Harriet Delaney and Nora Whitcomb both played crucial roles in ensuring safe navigation for watercraft in past centuries.: Says they are similar (“both played crucial roles”) — the opposite of a difference. ✗
  • Choice B — From 1832 to 1862, the nighttime waters of Florida were made more navigable thanks to Harriet Delaney.: Mentions only Harriet; Nora is absent. Cannot contrast two people with one. ✗
  • Choice C — Harriet Delaney worked as a lighthouse keeper in an earlier century than did Nora Whitcomb.: Names both keepers and explicitly marks the temporal contrast (19th vs. 20th century). ✓
  • Choice D — As the lighthouse keeper at Bridgeport Breakwater Light, Nora Whitcomb helped watercraft navigate at night.: Mentions only Nora; Harriet is absent. ✗
That matches Choice C — Harriet Delaney worked as a lighthouse keeper in an earlier century than did Nora Whitcomb..
